TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2017 MASERATI LEVANTE. WHILE THE BRAKE PEDAL WAS DEPRESSED, THE VEHICLE SHIFTED INTO NEUTRAL OR PARK AUTOMATICALLY. WHILE THE ACCELERATOR PEDAL WAS DEPRESSED, THE VEHICLE WOULD NOT MOVE. THE CONTACT HAD TO SHUT OFF AND RESTART THE VEHICLE FOR IT TO OPERATE

narrative.headline: What 2017 Maserati Levante owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 15 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (67% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
